identified_gaps.description: Handling severe missing modalities across different hospitals in federated learning setups.
identified_gaps.why_underexplored: Existing methods assume all participating hospitals have access to the same imaging modalities (e.g., both MRI and CT), which is rarely true in practice.
identified_gaps.feasibility_note: Strong — several recent datasets support this setup.

identified_gaps.description: Federated unlearning for patient right-to-be-forgotten requests.
identified_gaps.why_underexplored: Current algorithms require complete retraining when a patient revokes their data consent.
